headcount_quote: As of December 31, 2025, Gilead had approximately 17,000 employees.
research_notes: FY2025 10-K filed February 24, 2026 (accession 0000882095-26-000006). ~17,000 employees at December 31, 2025 (down from ~17,600 at end of FY2024, ~18,000 at end of FY2023). Human Capital section covers inclusion/diversity (demographics by gender and race/ethnicity), talent development (~3,500 leaders in development in 2024), total rewards, and employee listening strategy. No breakdown by functional role or business unit (R&D, commercial, manufacturing, G&A) disclosed. Consistent across all recent 10-K filings reviewed (FY2022-FY2025). Roles array empty per real-filings-only policy.
